section 1  
import re  

def count_word_occurrences(text, word):  
    # convert both text and word to lowercase  
    text = text.lower()  
    word = word.lower()  
    # find all occurrences of the word in the text  
    return len(re.findall(r'\b' + re.escape(word) + r'\b', text))  

section 2  
# example usage  
text = "Freedom and justice are ideals we must pursue relentlessly. Freedom is the path to prosperity and peace."  
word = "freedom"  
print(count_word_occurrences(text, word))  

section 3  
# test case  
text = "hello world hello"  
word = "hello"  
print(count_word_occurrences(text, word))  

section 4  
# test case  
text = "hello world hello"  
word = "world"  
print(count_word_occurrences(text, word))
